task: Self-contained task: do not consult /Users/feijun/.codex/memories or emit memory citations; final output JSON only. Scope only scripts/legion_core.py and tests/test_legion_core.py. Fix only this first slice from v5/v6/v7 reviews: (1) worker results must be strict whole-file JSON; remove prose-wrapped fallback; validate schema-equivalent keys/types for status, summary, files_touched, verification, findings, risks and nested verification/findings items before accepting terminal status. (2) status/read-only paths must not init_state or create state dirs/files on fresh missing state. (3) wait_readiness must fail if rejected_expected is non-empty and must report the original explicit expected roster; readiness orders must not collapse invalid expected IDs into Ready 0/0. (4) readiness must not count a direct L2 as active/ready if its tmux session is missing/inaccessible. (5) classify rescue as delivery/write-capable so L1 direct no-delivery and scope policy apply. Add focused regression tests for these five items and preserve all previous tests.
